news.title: Gold and silver prices fall in domestic market
news.description: KATHMANDU: The prices of gold and silver declined in the local market today compared to last Friday. The price of gold dropped by Rs 4,800 per tola, while silver decreased by Rs 225 per tola. Accordin

news.title: Group Eleven to treble drill at Limerick sites after €7.5m fundraise
news.description: Canadian mining firm Group Eleven Resources is set to treble its Limerick exploration drilling after raising new funding, even after mining giant Glencore declined to take part in the round.

news.title: NSE to launch 10-gram gold futures contracts under commodity derivatives segment from March 16
news.description: NSE to launch 10-gram gold futures contracts in Commodity Derivatives segment starting March 16, 2026, approved by SEBI.

news.title: Gold and Silver in India: Beyond Tradition, A Strategic Allocation
news.description: In a world where policy outcomes are less predictable and correlations rise during stress, gold and silver may be seen less as vehicles for gains

news.title: Gold Rate Today, March 15, 2026: Check 22K and 24K Gold Prices in Delhi, Mumbai, Chennai and Other Cities

news.title: AWE首秀亮王牌：慕思，凭什么让一众科技大佬集体“躺平”？
news.description:
智能家居发展十余年，各类智能单品早已走进千家万户，但一个困局却始终未能突破：单品“智能化”多流于表面，且彼此孤立，难以串联成一个真正懂生活、主动服务人真实需求的“智能之家”。
 比如用于交流的语音助手，虽能随叫随应，但也会成为某一刻的噪音；又如守护安全的摄像头，并不能感知被褥之下人体的真实状态；即便是可掌控全屋智能的手机，却也不是24小时被人贴身操控。

news.title: 英伟达 GPU 缺货：微星电竞产品线拟涨价 15~30%，“今年是成立以来最严峻的一年”
news.description: IT之家 3 月 15 日消息，据中国台湾《经济日报》报道，由于存储器涨价加英伟达 GPU 供应短缺，微星将减少低价位产品出货，专注于中高端产品线，同时显卡类产品整体均价上调，电竞产品线涨价幅度预估在 15～30% 左右。微星总经理黄金请在本周五的法说会上表示，2026 年是公司成立以来面临的最严峻一年。PC 市场正遭遇严峻挑战。他预估全年 PC 市场可能衰退 10% 至 20%，比调研机构普遍预

news.title: A novel planctomycetotal isolate from subsurface percolates belongs to the novel species Anatilimnocola aquadivae sp. nov. in the family Pirellulaceae
news.description: The family Pirellulaceae (phylum Planctomycetota) is known for its environmental versatility, with members isolated from marine habitats, algal surfaces, soil and lakes; yet, no member has been isolat

news.title: IT早报 0315：央视曝光报废车黑色产业链；腾讯“龙虾”开启全国巡装；英特尔 13/14 代酷睿 CPU 全球库存告急；字节辟谣“武汉研发中心全部被裁”...
news.description: “IT早报”时间，大家好，现在是 2026 年 3 月 15 日星期日，今天的重要科技资讯有：1、央视曝光报废车黑色产业链：三元催化器被翻新成假原厂件售卖，山东临沂成立联合工作组开展专项调查央视调查揭露山东临沂报废车拆解乱象：正规企业因车源短缺而停工，大量非法小作坊却在林地农田昼夜作业，将三元催化器等危险废物翻新成“假原厂件”售卖。这些翻新件性能不达标，威胁行车安全，而掏空核心的“车壳”则通过正规
